Package core

Class TrialBalanceResult

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.service.TrialBalanceResultIntf
core.TrialBalanceResult
public class TrialBalanceResult extends TrialBalanceResultIntf
TrialBalanceResult computes a ledgerâ€™s trial balance by aggregating the raw balances of all accounts. It implements TrialBalanceResultIntf so that debit and credit totals can be retrieved, and the balanced status is determined.

  • Constructor Details

    • TrialBalanceResult

      public TrialBalanceResult(Set<Account> accounts)
      Constructs a TrialBalanceResult from the given set of accounts. It computes the raw balance for each account and aggregates the sums by account type.
      Parameters:
      accounts - a non-null, non-empty set of Account objects.

    • TrialBalanceResult

      public TrialBalanceResult(Map<AccountType,Double> debitSums2, Map<AccountType,Double> creditSums2)
      Constructor TrialBalanceResult
      Parameters:
      debitSums2 -
      creditSums2 -

  • Method Details

    • getDebitSums

      public Map<AccountType,Double> getDebitSums()
      Returns an unmodifiable map of debit sums (positive values) keyed by account type name.
      Overrides:
      getDebitSums in class TrialBalanceResultIntf
      Returns:
      a Map with account identifiers as keys and total debit amounts as values.

    • getCreditSums

      public Map<AccountType,Double> getCreditSums()
      Returns an unmodifiable map of credit sums (positive values) keyed by account type name.
      Overrides:
      getCreditSums in class TrialBalanceResultIntf
      Returns:
      a Map with account identifiers as keys and total credit amounts as values.

    • isBalanced

      public boolean isBalanced()
      Returns whether the trial balance is balanced (total debits equal total credits).
      Overrides:
      isBalanced in class TrialBalanceResultIntf
      Returns:
      true if total debits equal total credits (within a tolerance), false otherwise.
